question: Show the names of buildings and the names of regions they are in.
sql: SELECT building.Name, region.Name FROM building INNER JOIN region ON building.Region_ID = region.Region_ID;

back_translation.intent: 获取建筑物和其所属地区的名称列表

semantic.reason: 语义一致，原始问题要求展示建筑物和其所属地区的名称，SQL反向翻译描述准确反映了这一意图，涉及的表、列和操作均匹配。
